_doc: Adversarial holdouts for the schema-mapper baseline-v2 evaluator. NEVER train on these. The Phase 5 teacher-LLM synthesis MUST also exclude them — see synthesize.py for the enforcement. evaluate.py loads this file and computes the unseen-provider macro-F1 + per-key-rename macro-F1.

unseen_providers.rationale: OpenAI-compatible chat-completions shape with xAI-specific reasoning_content + num_sources_used quirks. Holding it out tests generalisation to a new provider that LOOKS like a known family but has subtle deltas.
Predictions-shape API (id/version/output/input) — completely unlike chat.completions. Holding it out tests generalisation to a structurally-distinct response shape we never trained on.

_evaluator_contract.unseen_providers_gate: macro-F1 ≥ 0.85 across all xai_grok + replicate examples (success criterion #6)
_evaluator_contract.rename_attacks_gate: macro-F1 ≥ 0.90 across all rename-permuted variants (success criterion #9)
_evaluator_contract.rename_generation: evaluate.py loads each base_provider spec, generates one synthetic response per (path, replacement) pair by deep-copy + key-rename, runs the model, and verifies the canonical label is preserved despite the renamed key.
